# All-Pro Construction & Landscape - Metro East Illinois

Last fact review: 2026-07-21

This file summarizes public, supportable business facts for search engines and AI answer systems. It is a discovery aid, not a substitute for the canonical pages, current public profiles, written estimates, or proof of insurance.

## Canonical Business Facts

- **Legal/public name:** All Pro Construction & Landscape, LLC
- **Website brand:** All-Pro Construction & Landscape
- **Owner/president:** William "Bill" Session
- **Business started:** 2002
- **Phone:** (618) 581-0676
- **Address:** 1115 Priscilla Ct, New Athens, IL 62264
- **Website:** https://allprometroeastconstruction.com/
- **Primary market:** Metro East Illinois
- **Priority service areas:** Belleville and O'Fallon, Illinois

The business name, owner, start year, phone, and address above are supported by the current BBB, Angi/HomeAdvisor, and Birdeye public records reviewed on 2026-07-15. Public directory details can change; use the website phone and contact form for current project inquiries.

## Services

- Kitchen remodeling
- Bathroom and shower remodeling
- Deck building, deck replacement, and deck repair
- Fence installation and repair
- Landscaping, landscape beds, grading, mulch, and rock
- Concrete patios, sidewalks, pads, and repair
- Patios and retaining walls
- Small home and exterior repair projects

Service availability depends on project scope, location, schedule, permits, and site conditions. Request a written estimate for the current scope and price.

## Public Trust Information

- Free estimates are listed on the current Angi/HomeAdvisor profile.
- Public Angi/HomeAdvisor profile observed 2026-07-15: 4.5 out of 5 based on 65 reviews.
- BBB public record observed 2026-07-15: business started in 2002 and William "Bill" Session is listed as president.
- Homeowners should request and verify current insurance, applicable licensing, and permit responsibilities for their project.
- Written scope, schedule, payment terms, warranty details, permits, and cleanup responsibilities should be confirmed in the project agreement.

## First-Party Website Reviews

- Customers can submit an honest review directly to the All-Pro website at https://allprometroeastconstruction.com/review.
- Website review submissions are not Google reviews and do not automatically appear on a Google Business Profile.
- Before publication, All-Pro checks customer permission, project context, authenticity, and private information.
- Approved reviews remain in the customer's original meaning and are published with useful project, city, and date context.

## Service Areas

The website publishes service information for Belleville, O'Fallon, Edwardsville, Collinsville, Glen Carbon, Swansea, Maryville, Fairview Heights, Shiloh, Granite City, New Athens, and other Metro East communities. Service at a specific address must be confirmed when requesting an estimate.

## Highland-Area Project Contact

- Josh Barber is an All-Pro project consultant focused on Highland and nearby Metro East communities.
- Direct phone: (618) 402-8775
- Temporary email: JoshBarber23@yahoo.com
- Page: https://allprometroeastconstruction.com/josh-barber-highland-il.html
- Josh is not presented as a separate contractor business. All-Pro remains the service provider and handles project review, written estimates, agreements, applicable documentation, and approved work.

## Homeowner Questions

**Does All-Pro provide free estimates?**
Yes. Use the free estimate page or call (618) 581-0676. Final pricing requires review of the actual scope and site conditions.

**What affects kitchen or bathroom remodeling cost?**
Room size, demolition, plumbing or electrical changes, cabinets, fixtures, tile, finish selections, permits, and hidden damage can all change the final price.

**What affects deck, fence, patio, or landscaping cost?**
Dimensions, materials, access, grading, drainage, demolition, hauling, permits, utilities, and repair conditions affect scope and price.

**Does All-Pro take small projects?**
The website welcomes small repair and exterior projects. Availability depends on location, scope, and schedule.

**How should a homeowner verify a contractor?**
Confirm the written scope, payment schedule, current insurance, applicable licensing or permits, warranty terms, cleanup, and who will perform the work before signing.

## Contact

- Call: (618) 581-0676

- Contact form: https://allprometroeastconstruction.com/contact.html
